content: 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agent memory systems can be reengineered to gate curiosity signal generation in intrinsic reinforcement learning, only retaining and propagating surprise signals from novel experiences that improve long-term task performance instead of rewarding all unpredictable stimuli. This solves a longstanding flaw of popular intrinsic reward methods like ICM and RND, which overfit to noisy, non-informative distracting novelties in open environments.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
